tr.td: Carbon dioxide [Partial pressure] in Arterial blood
Carbon dioxide [Partial pressure] in Venous blood
Carbon dioxide, total [Moles/volume] in Venous blood
Activated clotting time (ACT) of Blood by Coagulation assay

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The results indicate mild acidemia (low arterial and venous pH) with normal bicarbonate and mildly elevated venous pCO₂, suggesting a primary respiratory acidosis. Arterial oxygen saturation is slightly reduced. Coagulation (ACT) and magnesium are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for underlying respiratory compromise and monitoring of oxygenation and acid-base status.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Vecchio di Montebelluna
